articles.description:
Ahead of the Super Bowl, Crumbl bakes a new Fudge Brownie Football Cookie as part of its weekly rotation from February 2 through February 7, 2026. Here's what this week's limited-time lineup looks like:

- Fudge Brownie Football Cookie - A brownie-inspired cookie topped with fudge frosting and white cream cheese "football laces."
- Dubai Cookie - Returning for yet another week, the Dubai Cookie is a brownie cookie layered with a crunchy kataifi and pistachio filling, finished with milk chocolate and a drizzle of pistachio cream.
- Peanut Butter Cup Brownie featuring Reese's - A brownie topped with peanut butter mousse, a chocolate drizzle, and Reese's Peanut Butter Cup pieces.
- Caramel Shortbread Cookie featuring Twix - A shortbread-inspired cookie filled with Twix pieces, topped with caramel, milk chocolate, and chopped Twix pieces.
- Confetti Cake Cookie - A sugar cookie with confetti sprinkles, topped with pink vanilla cream cheese frosting and more confetti sprinkles.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Fudge Brownie Football Cookie

articles.description:
Panera reintroduces Asiago Bagel Stacks as a permanent addition to its lunch and dinner menu. They are joined by a new, limited-time trio of Breakfast Bagel Stacks.


The permanent Asiago Bagel Stacks include:
- Chicken Roma Asiago Bagel Stack - Grilled chicken, melty fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, chopped basil, fresh arugula, Green Goddess dressing, salt,, pepper, and a garlic aioli drizzle on an Asiago Bagel.​
- Spicy Steak Asiago Bagel Stack - Marinated steak, melty provolone, creamy salsa verde spread, fresh arugula, red onions, and sweet peppers on an Asiago Bagel.​
As for the new, limited-time Breakfast Bagel Stacks (breakfast items are available before 11AM), they include:
- Wake-Up BLT Asiago Everything Bagel Stack (pictured) - Applewood-smoked bacon, scrambled egg, vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh arugula, salt, pepper, and cheesy benedict sauce, served on a new Asiago Everything Bagel. The new bagel is a bagel baked with "sharp and tangy" asiago cheese and an everything bagel seasoning made of sesame seeds, poppy seeds, dried garlic, dried onion, and salt.
- Farmhouse Duo Asiago Bagel Stack - Applewood-smoked bacon, sausage patty, scrambled egg, salt, pepper, and cheesy benedict sauce, served on an Asiago Bagel.
- Sausage & Egg Asiago Bagel Stack -A sausage patty, scrambled egg, melty American cheese, salt, pepper, and garlic aioli, served on an Asiago Bagel.
Other new items at Panera include:
- Asiago Croissant Twists - Two all-butter croissant twists topped with asiago cheese.
- Toasted Caprese Focaccia - Melty fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh arugula, basil pesto spread, salt, pepper, and balsamic glaze, served on Black Pepper Focaccia.
The new Asiago Everything Bagel can also be purchased on its own.
Photo via Panera Bread.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Asiago Bagel Stacks are Back at Panera

Chocomania has returned to Krispy Kreme and brings with it a set of four new donuts glazed with Hershey's chocolate. The 2026 Krispy Kreme x Hershey's Chocomania Collection is available now through Sunday, February 1, 2026, and includes:

- New Chocolate Cheesecake Donut - A Hershey's Chocolate Original Glazed donut topped with a swirl of cheesecake topping and Hershey's mini chocolate chips.
- New Chocolate Chip Cookie Donut - A Hershey's Chocolate Original Glazed donut dipped in chocolate icing and Hershey's Chocolate Chip Cookie Crunch.
- New Chocolate Party Donut - A Hershey's Chocolate Original Glazed donut with Hershey's chocolate drizzle and rainbow nonpareils.
- New Hershey's Chocolate Original Glazed Donut - An Original Glazed donut covered in Hershey's chocolate glaze.
Last year's batch of Chocomania Donuts featured Hershey's Milk Chocolate icing, whereas this year's key feature is new Hershey's chocolate glaze.
The donut chain is also offering a deal this weekend, from Friday, January 30, 2026, through Sunday, February 1, 2026, where you can get a dozen Original Glazed donuts for $2 when you buy any dozen donuts.
Photo via Krispy Kreme.

articles.description:
Shake Shack introduces the new True Love Shake as a Valentine's Day-themed shake to join its 2025-2026 winter shake lineup.

The True Love Shake features vanilla frozen custard blended with strawberry puree and poured into a cup lined with a crackable dark chocolate shell. The shake is then topped with chocolate whipped cream and strawberry curls.
On February 10, 2026 (Red Tuesday, known as the most common day for breaking up), you can get 50% off a True Love Shake (to help soothe any heartbreak, apparently). Then on February 14, 2026 (Valentine's Day), if you buy a True Love Shake, you can get one for free.
Both deals are only available when ordering through an in-restaurant kiosk or through the Shake Shack website or mobile app, at participating locations. The code for the Red Tuesday deal is "SELFLOVE", while the code for the Valentine's Day deal is "SHARELOVE".
Shake Shack's winter shake lineup also includes:
- Tiramisu Shake - Tiramisu frozen custard blended with coffee, topped with whipped cream, cocoa, and a ladyfinger cookie.
- New Chocolate Blackout Pudding Shake - Chocolate blackout pudding frozen custard blended with chocolate graham cracker crunch, topped with chocolate whipped cream and crumbled chocolate graham crackers.
- K-Shack Spicy Caramel Shake - Vanilla frozen custard blended with a gochujang caramel sauce, topped with whipped cream and a drizzle of gochujang caramel sauce.
Photo via Shake Shack.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Shake Shack Introduces New True Love Shake

articles.description:
Papa Johns introduces a "reimagined" Pan Pizza starting Thursday, January 29, 2026. The new version features "crispy caramelized edges, a pillowy, airy center, and an indulgent six-cheese blend."

Specifically, the updated Pan Pizza features a thick, fluffy crust with Parmesan and Special Garlic Sauce baked between the crust and pan for a caramelized finish and crispy crunch. The six-cheese blend includes cheese made from Mozzarella, Provolone, Fontina, Asiago, Parmesan, and Romano. The pizza is finished with a dusting of Italian seasonings.
At launch, Papa Johns will be offering medium 1-topping Pan Pizza for $11.99, at participating locations nationwide.
The chain's previous Pan Pizza (you can find my review of that version here) was discontinued in 2019.
Photo via Papa Johns.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Papa John's Debuts "Reimagined" Pan Pizza

articles.description:
Dunkin' welcomes new Protein Milk as a beverage add-on and is featuring it in several drinks in its 2025-2026 winter menu.

The new Protein Milk offers a "creamy, familiar taste without a chalky texture or aftertaste" and adds 15 grams of protein in a medium drink. It can be added to any drink that can have a milk or alternative milk base, including coffees, lattes, matcha, and Refreshers.
Based on the ingredients and employee accounts, the Protein Milk is Lactaid Protein 2% Reduced Fat Milk, which is mostly a mix of reduced-fat milk and ultra-filtered skim milk (and includes the lactase enzyme because that's how Lactaid works).

McDonald's introduces new Hot Honey Sauce for a limited time. The new sauce is described as a "blend of sweet honey and spicy heat, infused with a subtle vinegar note."

You can get McDonald's Hot Honey Sauce in a dip cup with an order of Chicken McNuggets or McCrispy Strips, or purchase it separately for a small additional charge. The new sauce is also featured in several menu items, including:
- Hot Honey Sausage Egg Biscuit - A pork sausage patty, folded egg, and Hot Honey Sauce served on a biscuit.
- Bacon Hot Honey McCrispy Sandwich - A McCrispy filet, Hot Honey Sauce, thick-cut applewood-smoked bacon, crispy-fried jalapenos, shredded lettuce, mayo served on a toasted potato roll.
- Hot Honey McCrispy Sandwich - A McCrispy filet, Hot Honey Sauce, crispy-fried jalapenos, shredded lettuce, and mayo served on a toasted potato roll. 
- Hot Honey Snack Wrap - A McCrispy strip, shredded cheese, shredded lettuce, and Hot Honey Sauce wrapped in a tortilla.
While most of the selection consists of regular menu items with Hot Honey Sauce added, the crispy-fried jalapenos are a limited-time ingredient for the promotion.
Photo via McDonald's.

This week, Domino's is offering a limited-time deal where you can get large 2-topping pizzas for $6.99 each when ordering for carryout through Sunday, February 1 2026, at participating locations nationwide.

The limited-time deal is available with several crust options, including Hand Tossed, Crunchy Thin, or New York Style crust. You can also get Parmesan Stuffed Crust for an extra charge (note that the crust only comes in medium).
The deal makes for a $1 savings (and one extra topping) over Domino's long-running $7.99 large one-topping carryout deal.
The deal may be slightly higher in some areas (it costs $7.99 here in Los Angeles).
Photo via Domino's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Domino's Offers $6.99 Large 2-Topping Pizza Carryout Deal

articles.description:
Taco Bell's Salted Caramel Churros feature mini churros with a creamy filling, dusted with salted caramel sugar.

These come three to an order and cost me $2.29.
Out of the bag, these looked pretty pale and disappointingly small. You can easily eat each one in a single bite.



The churros were light and crispy with a bit of chew under the crust. The filling is the same cream cheese icing that you find in Taco Bell's Cinnabon Delights. 
The salted caramel sugar was salty but lacked much of a caramel flavor. It seemed to be the same stuff they used for the Dulce del Leche Cinnamon Delights last year. I wouldn't have thought they were caramel-flavored at all if I didn't already know.



Overall, Taco Bell's Salted Caramel Churros were a miss for me. There's not all that much to nom on, and the main flavor is the creamy filling that you can already get from Cinnabon Delights. They had me missing when Taco Bell still offered a regular churro.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Review: Taco Bell - Salted Caramel Churros

- New White Drop Cookie featuring Hershey's Cookies 'N' Creme - A warm cookies & cream cookie topped with a melty mix of Hershey's Cookies 'n Creme and white drop pieces, and a single Hershey's Cookies 'n' Creme candy bar segment.
